summary.en: Moldova-connected PV inverters are commonly reviewed for anti-islanding and loss-of-mains behaviour during project acceptance by ANRE and site operator expectations. IEC 62116 and EN 50549-series references are commonly used, but setting values and documentation format remain project-specific in Moldova.
summary.zh: 与摩尔多瓦项目挂接的光伏逆变器通常在项目验收中由ANRE和现场运营要求审查防孤岛与失电网行为。IEC 62116及EN 50549系列常被引用，但参数设置和文件格式在摩尔多瓦通常是项目特定的。
summary.zht: 與摩爾多瓦專案掛接之光伏逆變器通常在專案驗收中由ANRE與現場營運要求審查防孤島與失電網行為。IEC 62116及EN 50549系列常被引用，但參數設定與文件格式在摩爾多瓦多為專案特定。

standards_or_laws: Project-specific distribution and interconnection protection settings

summary.en: China test reports under GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964-2024 support technical review, yet trip thresholds and reconnection behavior must be mapped to Moldova project settings before commissioning.
summary.zh: 中国GB/T 37408与GB/T 19964-2024下的测试报告可支持技术审查，但跳闸阈值和重连行为必须在投运前映射到摩尔多瓦项目设置。
summary.zht: 中國GB/T 37408與GB/T 19964-2024下的測試報告可支持技術審查，但跳脫閾值與重連行為必須在投運前對映到摩爾多瓦專案設定。

gap.en: The gap is parameter compatibility and evidence traceability for Moldova acceptance, including anti-islanding test reports, voltage and frequency trip tables for 50 Hz 230/400 V systems, reconnection logic, firmware control, and commissioning trace records.
gap.zh: 差距在于摩尔多瓦验收所需的参数兼容性和证据可追溯性，包括防孤岛型式试验报告、50 Hz 230/400 V系统的电压与频率跳闸表、重连逻辑、固件控制和调试留痕记录。
gap.zht: 差距在於摩爾多瓦驗收所需的參數相容性與證據可追溯性，包括防孤島型式試驗報告、50 Hz 230/400 V系統之電壓與頻率跳脫表、重連邏輯、韌體控制和調試留痕記錄。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where local grid acceptance requires anti-islanding and loss-of-mains protection as a commissioning criterion
mandatory_status.cn: Not equivalent — Chinese settings are engineering references but need Moldova-specific confirmation

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat anti-islanding evidence as a project acceptance item for the Moldova site. China default trip settings and GB/T evidence need review before commissioning and handover.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将防孤岛证据作为摩尔多瓦现场项目验收事项。中国默认跳闸设置和GB/T证据须在投运与移交前复核。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將防孤島證據作為摩爾多瓦現場專案驗收事項。中國預設跳脫設定與GB/T證據須在投運與移交前復核。
